\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3363 introduces Energy Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{E}( \rho_{ \text{input}}) = \sum_k E_k \rho_{ \text{input}} E_k^ \dagger \end{equation}
